facebook.caption:
29,348 reviews. 4.9 stars. At a beach resort with 1,399 rooms.

Wyndham Grand Phu Quoc sits right on Bãi Dài, one of the longest stretches of sand on the island. Water park, multiple dining spots, bars, and ocean access. All in one place.

This is the kind of resort that makes people forget they had a return flight booked.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Bãi Dài beach at your door. A water park on the grounds. 4.9 stars from nearly 30,000 guests. Wyndham Grand Phu Quoc delivers every single time. Tag your travel buddy.
